# Bad fixture — rule #23 pass-06 MED fold-in (advances/advanced forms)

## Why this plan exists

Pass-06 MED fold-in on the methodology-trim-arc plan required the
rule #23 verb list to enumerate the advance/advances/advanced and
dispatch/dispatches/dispatched forms explicitly. This fixture
exercises each form so a future verb-list regression would be
caught.

## §1 — Evidence census

| # | Claim | Status |
|---|---|---|
| E1 | Fixture exercises every advance/dispatch inflection | verified |

## Rollout detail

Slice 64 advances the ratchet. Slice 65 advanced its close criteria
before the arc opened. Slice 66 dispatches the Codex pass on the
ADR amendment. Slice 67 dispatched the live-state helper pass last
night.
